evidence_checks.evidence: No post-exit fields are used as features.
Risk model explains historical fragility; it is not a live execution rule.

filter_suggestions.suggested_filter: Review trades where atr_pct is >= 0.0381; do not deploy the filter until it survives holdout review.
Review trades where trend_score is <= -0.1433; do not deploy the filter until it survives holdout review.

counterfactual_hint: Start the counterfactual review with trend_score. Compare the bad-trade rate before and after tightening that condition before using it as a live filter.
counterfactual_suggestions: Primary driver is 'trend_score' — compare bad-trade rate above vs. below its median.
Overall bad-trade rate is 47.1%. Tighten 'trend_score' filter and measure holdout impact before deploying.
Secondary driver 'atr_pct' is orthogonal — test a compound filter (trend_score AND atr_pct) on out-of-sample data.
Keep immutable trade context (symbol, session) fixed; only adjust actionable setup conditions when testing counterfactuals.
